text.title: filesystem-as-working-memory Failure Modes
text.summary: Four failure modes with symptom, root cause, and repair.

section.title: Antipatterns

antipattern.description: Compaction fires at 50-60% utilisation while large tool outputs remain inline.
antipattern.reason: Lossy compression applied while lossless offload was still available. Recoverable facts get burned.

section.p: Symptom: agent claims it cannot remember a path it used three turns ago. Root cause: ordering wrong. Fix: enforce r5-compact-last — never trigger LLM compaction until offload yields no further reduction.

antipattern.description: Tool reads a file, returns full content; model emits another tool call to write the same content to a different file.
antipattern.reason: The blob crosses the model boundary twice for no reason — pay token cost on data the model never needed to "see".

section.p: Symptom: doubled token cost for file copy operations. Root cause: missing server-side copy primitive. Fix: add a `copy_file(src, dst)` server tool that returns only `{copied_from, to}`; content never enters the model.

antipattern.description: FS in `/tmp` or in-process RAM, conversation in durable store. Restart leaves the agent with paths that 404.
antipattern.reason: Two persistence boundaries; the agent's references decay independently of its awareness of them.

section.p: Symptom: post-restart agent reads files that no longer exist. Root cause: split persistence. Fix: same-store atomic checkpoint of FS + conversation; or write-ahead reconciliation step on resume.

antipattern.description: Agent invents top-level folder names per call (`tmp_search_42/`, `notes_today/`).
antipattern.reason: `ls` becomes useless; agent forgets where it put things; reproducibility drops.

section.p: Symptom: agent re-fetches data it already wrote because it cannot find the earlier copy. Root cause: no taxonomy enforcement. Fix: hard-code `search/`, `docs/`, `plan/`, `scratch/` in SKILL.md; validator rejects paths outside.
